message:
fix(witness): fire CheckConvoysForIssue from zombie detection paths (gt-nsteq7)

Convoy auto-close only triggered on the MERGED path, so polecats that closed
their beads without completing gt done left convoys stuck open forever.

Add CheckConvoysForIssue calls to all zombie detection paths in
DetectZombiePolecats: stuck-in-done, agent-dead-in-session,
bead-closed-still-running, done-intent-dead, and standard zombie cleanup.
Each call reads the hook bead before nuke and notifies convoys if the bead
was closed, enabling convoy auto-close even without the full merge chain.
